name: io.github.zcag/tela
title: tela
description: Self-hostable markdown team wiki: agents search, read, and write your wiki pages over MCP.

oauth.description: OAuth 2.1 with PKCE via WorkOS AuthKit. HTTP-transport hosts run the flow automatically — no manual token handling.

pat.description: Personal access token sent as an Authorization: Bearer header. Create one in Settings -> API Keys.

packages.description: Thin stdio<->HTTP proxy for stdio-only hosts. Set TELA_BASE_URL and TELA_API_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: TELA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Origin of the tela instance, e.g. https://tla.portalos.ru
